name: The Guest Book
overview: Guests bring their baggage and own special brand of crazy to a vacation cottage and record their confessions, alibis and farewells in the cottage’s guest book. Each season features a new town, and along with it a new cottage and town locals, though characters from previous season often come along for the ride.

trailers.title: The Guest Book: All-New Thursdays at 10:30/9:30c! [TRAILER] | TBS
